zh.lifeSummary: 當William John Hackney於1645年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇時，他的父親Richard M. Hackney40歲，母親Millie Anne Griggs45歲。他和Elizabeth Mary至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1701年7月7日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州。

nameMeanings.name: Hackney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Hackney in Greater London, named from an Old English personal name Haca (genitive Hacan) + ēg ‘island, dry ground in marshland’.

perhaps from Middle English hakenei (Old French haquenée), an ambling horse or mare, especially one considered suitable for women to ride; perhaps therefore a metonymic occupational name for a breeder or keeper of such horses and short for Hakeneyman. This surname has also been found in Scotland since medieval times.

variants.name: Oakley
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of numerous places called Oakley, Oakle, or Oakleigh, in Bedfordshire, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Suffolk, or Wiltshire. The placenames derive from Old English āc ‘oak’ + lēah ‘open woodland’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When William John Hackney was born in 1645, in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, Richard M. Hackney, was 40 and his mother, Millie Anne Griggs, was 45. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Mary. He died before 7 July 1701, in Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William John Hackney est né en 1645, à Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard M. Hackney, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Millie Anne Griggs, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Mary. Il est décédé avant 7 juillet 1701, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ko.lifeSummary: William John Hackney(이)가 1645년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard M. Hackney(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Millie Anne Griggs(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Mary(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1701년 7월 7일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William John Hackney родился в 1645 г. в местности краист чурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Richard M. Hackney было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Millie Anne Griggs, 45. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Mary. Он умер перед 7 июля 1701 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Hackney, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Millie Anne Griggs, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Mary. Murió antes de 7 de julio de 1701, en Virginia, British Colonial America.
